title: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
summary_full: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.
summary_public: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.
